plugins.name: checkmate
plugins.description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice. Anchors every run in the team's Spare General Google Drive folder to source past precedents (EAM, paratransit, microtransit, fixed-route) before drafting any row. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs (the bid decision is made before Checkmate is invoked). Every row cites a source; confidence scored per row; pre-submission review pass. Built for the Spare SE team to replace Responsive.
